_comment: Foreign Battleground (外域战场) dimension — major canon location in Renegade Immortal where Wang Lin spends a major arc fighting for Planet Suzaku's survival against outsiders. Canon: a brutal, endless battlefield outside the Sealed Cave World, reached via teleportation arrays from cultivation planets. Regions include open battle plains, soul-crystal flats (minable for the reward currency), void-rift wastes (where the boundary is unstable and outsiders invade), and ancient war ruins. Three biomes mapped via multi_noise: foreign_battlefield_plains (mid-temperature, wide continent range — the main battle plains), foreign_soul_crystal_flats (cool, oceanic/edge continents — minable crystal flats), foreign_void_rift_wastes (hot, high continents, high weirdness — unstable boundary wastes). Uses overworld noise settings (the battlefield is surface-like). Prime Directive: the war was objectively fought here; the corpses and soul crystals are real regardless of the player's perception.
